candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line with populated values; best top-line sales/revenue label.
Also a populated total revenue line and useful as fallback if labeling changes across periods.
Section header rather than the populated numeric line in preview.

variables.notes: Selected populated revenue lines as priority list; later code can take first non-missing value by year.

candidates.why: Conceptually closest total COGS label, but no values are shown and gross profit equals revenue, suggesting no separately reported COGS in the provided statement.
Possible COGS bucket, but unpopulated in preview.

variables.notes: No clearly reported populated cost of sales/cost of revenues line exists in the provided statements; gross profit equals revenue in preview, so treat COGS as missing.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D; per hierarchy this should be selected alone.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component but should not be preferred when an explicit populated SG&A row exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not an R&D expense line; it indicates SG&A excluding R&D, so it should not be used as XRD.

candidates.why: Most direct and preferred interest expense label.

candidates.why: Also a direct interest expense measure and good fallback if the simpler label is unavailable in some years.
Net interest measure; less preferred than pure interest expense but usable fallback.

candidates.why: Too narrow because it captures only lease-related interest, not total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list, preferring the most direct total interest expense label first.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred by rule.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-attributable common equity line and valid fallback.
Also matches common equity and appears equal to parent equity here; acceptable fallback.
Alternative common equity label with identical values; useful fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Less preferred because it could include minority interest and hybrid debt; use only if no parent/common equity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Chose parent/common equity lines in priority order to keep BE exclusive of any potential non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Could contain minority interest, but values are identical to parent equity, indicating no separately reported NCI in these statements.
Income statement flow item, not a balance sheet minority interest stock measure.
